California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Landforms layer record for gaz_id 228863, "Mitchell Canyon", Valley, Contra Costa Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":228863,"gaz_name":"Mitchell Canyon","gaz_featureclass":"Valley","fcode":15050,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Contra Costa"}; geometry multipoint, mouth-end point (Web Mercator -13573959.8431, 4571223.8266) converts to lon -121.936956, lat 37.941917. GNIS has no separate Stream-class record for "Mitchell Creek" itself (checked MapServer/6 layer, statewide — only Mendocino/Siskiyou/San Mateo entries, none in Contra Costa); this Valley record for the same-named, same-drainage "Mitchell Canyon" (through which the creek flows, per Wikipedia's Mount Diablo Creek article noting Mitchell Creek runs ~4 mi from Eagle Peak to join Mount Diablo Creek near Clayton) is the closest authoritative USGS anchor, and its northern/lower extent point is ~2.4km from the independently documented Mitchell Canyon trailhead/visitor center (37.9206, -121.9415) in the correct downstream direction. The file's prior coordinate (-121.9364, 37.8797) was ~1.7-6.9km from every GNIS-recorded feature in this drainage (Mitchell Canyon valley extent, Eagle Peak summit, Mitchell Rock summit) and appears to have been guessed from the closure text's generic "north slope of Mount Diablo" description rather than sourced.

parameters.note: Mitchell Creek, which drains Mitchell Canyon on the north slope of Mount Diablo (Mount Diablo State Park) toward Mount Diablo Creek and Suisun Bay, has historically supported spawning runs of steelhead/rainbow trout. The creek and its tributaries are closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Mitchell Creek and tributaries (Contra Costa Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. (Note: this water is closed to all fishing all year; license requirement is noted for statewide consistency only.)

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
